sections.paragraph:
κριτικός, ή, όν (s. κρίνω; Pla. et al.; Strabo, Plut., Lucian et al.; Philo, Mut. Nom. 110) able to discern/judge foll. by obj. gen. κ. ἐνθυμήσεων καὶ ἐννοιῶν καρδίας able to judge the thoughts and deliberations of the heart Hb 4:12.—DELG s.v. κρίνω. TW.

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

foll. foll. = followed, following

obj. obj. = object, objective

gen. gen. = genitive

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 570
